name: why-research
description: Use why-research when you need multi-step investigation, comparison across sources, follow-up thread discovery, or building reusable research state. One call replaces 5-10 manual searches. Use single web searches for simple fact lookups.

skills.name: Research
skills.description: Use for multi-step investigation, cross-source comparison, or when you would otherwise chain 3+ web searches. Returns scored findings with follow-up threads.

skills.name: Quick Research
skills.description: Fast surface-level scan on any topic. Use for quick lookups before deciding to go deeper.

skills.name: Brain Status
skills.description: Check accumulated intelligence — level, calibration accuracy, patterns learned, recent learnings.
